---
title: "Project Downloads"
jupyter: python3
---

<center>
**CS101::Spring 2026**
</center>

Use this page to download project files, starter code, and tutorial materials.

The page is organized by project folder. To add a new project later, place its files in a new folder inside `materials/files/`, render the site again, and Quarto will publish both the page and the downloadable files.

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

from collections import defaultdict
from pathlib import Path
import re
from urllib.parse import quote


def display_name(name: str) -> str:
    cleaned_name = name.replace("_", " ").replace("-", " ")
    cleaned_name = re.sub(r"([A-Za-z])(\d)", r"\1 \2", cleaned_name)
    cleaned_name = re.sub(r"(\d)([A-Za-z])", r"\1 \2", cleaned_name)
    return cleaned_name.title()


def file_type(path: Path) -> str:
    if path.name.startswith(".") and not path.suffix:
        return "Config"
    if path.suffix:
        return path.suffix.lstrip(".").upper()
    return "File"


def link_target(path: Path) -> str:
    return quote(path.as_posix(), safe="/-_.")


candidate_roots = [Path("files"), Path("materials/files")]
source_root = next((path for path in candidate_roots if path.exists()), None)
output_root = Path("files")

if source_root is None:
    print("> No project files are available yet. Add folders inside `materials/files/` and render the site again.")
else:
    project_dirs = sorted(
        path
        for path in source_root.iterdir()
        if path.is_dir() and not path.name.startswith(".")
    )

    if not project_dirs:
        print("> No project folders are available yet. Add folders inside `materials/files/` and render the site again.")
    else:
        for project_dir in project_dirs:
            project_files = sorted(
                path
                for path in project_dir.rglob("*")
                if path.is_file() and path.name != ".DS_Store"
            )

            if not project_files:
                continue

            groups = defaultdict(list)
            for file_path in project_files:
                group_key = file_path.parent.relative_to(project_dir)
                groups[group_key].append(file_path)

            print(f"## {display_name(project_dir.name)}\n")
            print(
                f"This project currently has {len(project_files)} downloadable file(s) organized into {len(groups)} folder(s).\n"
            )

            for group_key in sorted(groups, key=lambda value: value.as_posix()):
                if group_key == Path("."):
                    print("### Project Files\n")
                else:
                    print(f"### {display_name(group_key.name)}\n")
                    print(f"Folder: `{group_key.as_posix()}`\n")

                print("| File | Type | Download |")
                print("| --- | --- | --- |")

                for file_path in groups[group_key]:
                    file_relative = file_path.relative_to(source_root)
                    download_path = output_root / file_relative
                    print(
                        "| "
                        f"`{file_path.name}`"
                        " | "
                        f"{file_type(file_path)}"
                        " | "
                        f"[Download]({link_target(download_path)})"
                        " |"
                    )

                print()
```
